chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-172 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 538/025 2.For orders on CM 539/25 3.For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Shewak Ram Valeecha, Advocate along with petitioners. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. By way of instant petition, petitioners seek directions to the official respondents, particularly SHO, P.S, Salehpat not to cause any sort of havoc and harassment to them and their family at the instance of private respondents. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will not cause any sort of harassment to the petitioners at the behest of private respondents. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of a/w listed applications with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioners, strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
